penalties.description: Exercise completed notification appears before loop tail is cut inside the trainer, indicating incomplete task execution.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows ligating loop placement around all three appendages with visible loop positioning and pusher advancement. However, the exercise completion notification appears in frame 19 while the loops are still visible on the appendages with tails present, indicating the task was not properly completed according to FLS requirements. The tail cutting phase inside the trainer is not observed. Maximum time reached without proper completion results in zero score.
